name: sklint
description: StableKite Python linter and static analyzer

sklint.executablePath.description: Optional path to the sklint executable. Empty value auto-detects the bundled binary, workspace target/release or target/debug, virtual environments and PATH. Invalid absolute paths are ignored.

sklint.strict.description: Fallback strict mode. pyproject.toml has priority when present.

sklint.select.description: Fallback Ruff-like rule selectors, e.g. SK101. pyproject.toml has priority when present.

sklint.ignore.description: Fallback Ruff-like ignore selectors, e.g. SK001. pyproject.toml has priority when present.

sklint.run.description: Run diagnostics while editing or only on save. Default is runtime/onType.

sklint.formatting.enabled.description: Enable SKLint as a VSCode document formatter. Disabled by default; when enabled it participates like other formatters.

sklint.pyrightAware.filterDiagnostics.description: For SK701/SK702 in VSCode, suppress SKLint diagnostics that overlap Pylance/Pyright diagnostics. These rules target dynamic attribute cases that Pyright leaves clean.

sklint.pyrightAware.requireMissingSemant.description: For SK701/SK702 in VSCode, keep the diagnostic only when no semantic token covers the attribute. Disable if your semantic token provider is unavailable.

sklint.path.description: Deprecated alias for sklint.executablePath. Prefer leaving it empty and letting SKLint auto-detect the CLI.
